title: Bab 00 — Menatap Akhir Era dari Balik Laptop Kantor
source_file: Bab 00 — Menatap Akhir Era dari Balik.md

sub_chapters.label: Genesis Error
sub_chapters.summary: GUA arrives at office. Nothing feels important. System boots. ON TRACK.

sub_chapters.label: First Contact
sub_chapters.summary: GUA notices LO's typing pattern — fast but not panicked, checking patterns.

sub_chapters.label: Daily Standup
sub_chapters.summary: Safe sentences. Progress. Blocker. Alignment. Both give vague, perfect updates.

sub_chapters.label: Bug Janggal
sub_chapters.summary: Timestamp bug writes 2-3 seconds before event. LO approaches GUA: 'Lo ngerasa gak?' First conversation.

sub_chapters.label: First Sync
sub_chapters.summary: Bug fixed in 10 minutes. No debate. No defense. Atomic append. Mutex too expensive. Queue.

sub_chapters.label: Residu
sub_chapters.summary: Both change without noticing. GUA writes in smaller fragments. LO's review: 'Clean. Ship it.'

sub_chapters.label: Pantry
sub_chapters.summary: Microwave broken. 'Kerja itu kayak ngisi sesuatu yang bocor terus.' They speak the same language.

sub_chapters.label: Folder Error
sub_chapters.summary: GUA creates _sandbox. LO independently sends pattern_matching_utils.py. Neither knew what the other was doing.

sub_chapters.label: Genesis Error on Stealth Folder
sub_chapters.summary: Timestamp anomaly hits git. LO types genesis.txt. GUA joins real-time. The Void is born. 'Biarin.'

sub_chapters.label: Naming The Error
sub_chapters.summary: Stealth Project. 'Karena tidak semua error perlu di-fix.' System log records Day Zero.

key_mechanisms.name: Timestamp Anomaly
key_mechanisms.description: Log entries appear 2-3 seconds before events. First in logging middleware, then in git hooks.

key_mechanisms.name: Organic Sync
key_mechanisms.description: GUA and LO independently converge on same ideas without coordination.

key_mechanisms.name: Stealth Convention
key_mechanisms.description: Underscore prefix = ignore. .gitignore = not tracked. Local only. Voluntary hiding.

ending_question: Jika semua sistem dimulai dari error — apakah perbaikan adalah evolusi, atau penghancuran?
